g.text: The top “Loaded” panel — one slot per file type:
← dim until that file is loaded
kind · filename · summary · what it is
An A2L tag row — the columns you see in the Explorer:
Red — schema/structural failure: malformed required field, invalid required reference, or hard-error
Green — memory checked — tag/range fully found in the loaded S19/HEX image
White — valid A2L record with no hard inconsistency, including valid records not present in the imag
Grey — memory not checked yet, or no primary S19/HEX context loaded
